body.title: Queue: add dispatched and acked statuses
body.result: added dispatched (4.5) and acked (4.75) statuses to STATUS_ORDER between sprint and in_progress; validation passes
body.intention: I intend that the queue has explicit statuses for each handshake phase so Granny's watchdog can distinguish 'sent but not received' from 'received but not started'.
body.description:
The current queue statuses (sprint → in_progress → done) have no intermediate state between Granny sending work and the worker actually starting it. Add `dispatched` (Granny sent the envelope) and `acked` (shim received and replied 'got it') statuses. Both are transient — normal flow exits them within seconds or minutes. They become visible to the watchdog when they age past the timeout threshold.

**Affected files:** `lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py` (VALID_STATUSES, setstatus validation), `devices/queue/queue_device.py` (if queue device has status validation), `tests/test_datacenter_client.py` or equivalent queue tests
**Design rules:** no-sqlite (Postgres only for queue state)
**Scope boundary:** Add the two statuses and update validation. Do not implement the handshake protocol itself — that is T-shim-dispatch-handshake. Do not change Granny dispatch logic — that is T-granny-bus-dispatch.
**Completion criteria:** `cc_queue.py setstatus T-xxx dispatched` and `cc_queue.py setstatus T-xxx acked` succeed without validation error; existing status transitions still work; tests cover the new statuses.
